author: Walt Disney Imagineering YouTube
text:
Toy Story Land Behind the Scenes: Imagineers Reveal How It Was Designed
Step inside Toy Story Land at Walt Disney World as we uncover the process behind shrinking guests down to the size of a Green Army Soldier and how that impacts the set design and graphics you can find throughout the land!

✨ *What makes this special?*
• Imagineers really drew pictures with crayons for authenticity
• Lesser known characters were able to have their backstory expanded through graphics on boxes
• Before props in the land became reality, they started out as real toys built and modified by Imagineers

🎥 *Behind-the-Scenes with Imagineers*
WED Walks and WED Rides allows you to learn more about our Disney attractions and experiences with the Imagineers who brought them to life!
